message:
bd-2rj: add resilience tests for session index integration

Add two tests verifying session index resilience:
- session_save_succeeds_despite_index_issues: verifies Session::save()
  works even if index is unavailable (warn-only, no fail)
- list_sessions_fallback_to_filesystem: verifies explicit reindex
  recovers sessions from disk when index is empty

Total: 30 session_index_tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
